## What Does This PR Do?

<!-- A clear description of what you changed and why. "Fixed stuff" is not acceptable. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (something was broken, now it isn't)
- [ ] New feature (something new that doesn't break existing things)
- [ ] Breaking change (something new that definitely breaks existing things)
- [ ] Refactor (moved stuff around, nothing new, nothing broken — hopefully)
- [ ] Docs update (because documentation matters, apparently)
- [ ] CI/CD / tooling (pipelines, scripts, configs)

## How Was This Tested?

<!-- Tell us how you verified this works. "I ran it locally" is a start, but detail helps. -->

- [ ] Tested locally in dev mode (`pnpm dev`)
- [ ] Tested production build (`pnpm build && pnpm start`)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (or at least resized the browser window)
- [ ] Ran linting (`pnpm lint`)
- [ ] Ran spaghetti check (`pnpm spaghetti:check`)

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- If this touches the UI, show us. A picture is worth a thousand "it looks fine". -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines (typed, organized, not a mess)
- [ ] I used `@/` imports, not relative path soup
- [ ] No `any` types added (if you did, explain yourself below)
- [ ] No commented-out code left behind
- [ ] No console.logs committed (we're professionals here)
- [ ] Pre-commit hooks passed without me disabling them

## Notes for Reviewers

<!-- Anything the reviewer should know, look out for, or be warned about. -->
